ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weekly_data" (
  "week" TEXT /* Date of the week for the data */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "lag_cases" INTEGER /* Number of lagging cases */,
  "dose1_pct" REAL /* Percentage of population with first vaccine dose */,
  "fully_vacc_pct" REAL /* Percentage of population fully vaccinated */,
  "metro_status" INTEGER /* Metro area status (1 for metro, 0 for non-metro) */,
  "conservative_pct" REAL /* Percentage of conservative political affiliation in the county */,
  "pop_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "temp" REAL /* Average temperature during the week (in Celsius) */,
  "cases_pcap" REAL /* Cases per capita for the week */,
  "next_cases_pcap" REAL /* Projected cases per capita for the next week */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the week */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported in the week */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of tests that were positive during the week */,
  "vaccination_rate_change" REAL /* Change in vaccination rate from the previous week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week", "county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population in the county */,
  "health_care_workers" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare workers in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "total_doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccine doses administered */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was reported */,
  "doses_per_100" REAL /* Number of doses administered per 100 people */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Current vaccination status (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips", "date_reported")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_trends" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported case count */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of new COVID-19 cases reported on that date */,
  "rolling_average_7_days" REAL /* 7-day rolling average of new cases */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases that resulted in death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "percentage_minority" REAL /* Percentage of the population identifying as minority */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "age_0_17" REAL /* Percentage of the population aged 0-17 */,
  "age_18_64" REAL /* Percentage of the population aged 18-64 */,
  "age_65_plus" REAL /* Percentage of the population aged 65 and above */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week for which the temperature was recorded */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature for the week */,
  "high_temp" REAL /* Highest temperature recorded in the week */,
  "low_temp" REAL /* Lowest temperature recorded in the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips", "week")
)

CREATE TABLE "politics" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "democrat_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population identifying as Democrat */,
  "republican_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population identifying as Republican */,
  "independent_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population identifying as independent */,
  "other_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the population identifying with other political parties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_guidelines" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "guideline_date" TEXT /* Date the guideline was issued */,
  "guideline_description" TEXT /* Description of the health guideline */,
  "guideline_status" TEXT /* Current status of the guideline (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "guideline_source" TEXT /* Source of the guideline (e.g., state health department, CDC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips", "guideline_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of testing */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases from tests conducted */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of tests that were positive */,
  "test_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of tests that can be conducted daily */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips", "test_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "hospitalized_cases" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalized COVID-19 cases */,
  "icu_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ICU capacity available */,
  "ventilator_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ventilator capacity available */,
  "icu_occupancy" REAL /* Percentage of ICU beds occupied */,
  "ventilator_occupancy" REAL /* Percentage of ventilators in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "access_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., case increase, low vaccination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
